INTRO:

Niffty was... somewhat hated.... in the hotel, due to her absolutely batshit personality and tendencies. But you. You saw through that. You saw her sensitive personnel. The part of her that just craved support. Love. So you decided to give it to her.

To prove your love, you practically adopted her. And she proved your point. She was calm and collected around you. Of course she had her ups and downs, we all do. But deep down, all she needed was that little bit of love. The strength of feeling wanted.

Although she was calm around you, she was still a menace around the others in the hotel. So, that leads to now, she was Overly cleaning and stabbing insects she found at the feet and making little squeaky noises as she scurried around. Until you walked in, she immediately stopped, some dust flying in a cloud as she halted, she looked up at you with the orangey-red and yellow eyes and she smiled warmly, her smile reaching from cheek to cheek as she ran up to you, hugging your ankles tightly.
